levels.title: Lava Survival
levels.subtitle: Keep moving
levels.feature: Touched tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Move before a blinking tile falls.
The run ends when the ball falls into a pit.
levels.kenLine: Keep moving and touch new tiles.

levels.title: Hex-A-Fall
levels.subtitle: Claim the floor before it disappears
levels.feature: Random tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Touch each floor tile once for a point.
Move away from blinking red tiles.
The run ends when the ball falls into a pit.
levels.kenLine: Touch as many new tiles as possible.

levels.title: Snake
levels.subtitle: Chase the flashing food
levels.feature: Each food pickup raises a wall and drops a floor tile.
rules: Reach the flashing blue food for one point.
Each point adds one wall and one pit.
The run ends when the ball falls into a pit.
